{{Quote|Knire Dark, jah backa bundo.|Knire Dark introducing herself|audio=KnireDarkIntroduction.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
'''Syboonas''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings from the eponymous [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Syboona]]. They had thin physiques and long [[Limb/Legends|limbs]], and their heads featured long curved [[Mouth/Legends|muzzles]]. [[Knire Dark]] was a Syboona who distinguished [[Gender/Legends|herself]] in the sport of [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biology and appearance==
Syboonas were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of stocky [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings, who had long [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and [[Claw/Legends|clawed]], four-fingered hands as well as wide chests and long, curving [[Mouth/Legends|muzzles]]. Their skin was [[Color/Legends|blue]], and they stood on legs that ended in four-toed, clawed feet. The head featured red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and upright [[Ear/Legends|ears]].<ref name="SWRR" />

==Society and culture==
At least one Syboona, [[Knire Dark]], wore a long [[Clothing/Legends|garment]] of green, ornately patterned fabric with yellow designs that wrapped around [[Gender/Legends|her]] head and neck, trailed narrowly down her torso and formed a skirt of sorts at her waist, from which she wore a pair of dark brown trousers.<ref name="SWRR" />

==History==
{{Quote|The city's engineers assure us that the race won't have any effect on the city's safety, even if something should go…''wrong'' during the competition.|Race announcer [[Dax Gazaway]] describing the Ballast Complex, the track on which Knire Dark achieved fame|audio=DaxGazBallastComplexCitySafety.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
[[File:Knire_Dark_Racer.png|thumb|right|250px|Knire Dark pilots her green Serabyss Howler 1165.]]
The Syboona species [[Homeworld/Legends|originated]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Syboona]] in the [[Danjar sector/Legends|Danjar sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC Syboona">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Syboona system/Legends|Syboona system]]</ref> Knire Dark was a Syboona female and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who ran a [[Knire Dark's contraband storehouse|contraband storehouse]]; to cover this up, she also entered into the sport of [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]],<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|sports/13328_1.html|Podracing Faces Uncertain Future}}</ref> where she distinguished herself in the last [[Standard year|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="EP1note">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'', which includes the appearances of [[Serabyss Howler 1165]] and the [[Podracing Open]], takes place eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Star Wars: Racer Revenge'' must take place in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], which predates the [[Declaration of a New Order|fall]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by five years, according to ''The New Essential Chronology''.</ref> secretly using her career to [[Starship/Legends|ship]] contraband across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="SYE">{{SW|url=news/start-your-engines-star-wars-podracing-drivers-part-1|text=Start Your Engines: ''Star Wars'' Podracer Drivers, Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref>

==Syboonas in the galaxy==
{{Quote|Wor stop dookee!|Knire Dark celebrates a race victory|audio=KnireDarkWinning.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
The Podracer and smuggler Knire Dark competed in the Outer Rim Territories-wide [[Podracing Open]] in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]],<ref name="EP1note" /> where she flew a [[Serabyss Howler 1165]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]. Her criminal activities influenced her racing style; she was furtive and shy on the circuit, keeping her distance from other [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and only defending her position when absolutely necessary.<ref name="RRSG">[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Racer Revenge'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> The existence of her storehouse was discovered in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|sports/13328_1.html|Podracing Faces Uncertain Future}} provides a [[Great ReSynchronization]] date of 13:3:28, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to the explanation found [[:Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> by Republic agents and was one of several events that tarnished the reputation of the sport.<ref name="HNN" /> The incident roundly ended her career.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|166|Dark, Knire}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Knire_Dark_CA2.png|thumb|right|150px|Concept art for the Syboona species]]
The Syboona species first appeared in the [[2002]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''<ref name="SWRR" /> and was named in the [[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|accompanying strategy guide]], written by [[Mario De Govia]] and [[Damien Waples]].<ref name="RRSG" /> Concept art for the Syboona species in ''Racer Revenge'' differs little from Knire Dark's portrayal in game, though she is depicted with a [[Staff/Legends|staff]] of unknown significance in artwork; this item does not appear in the game itself.<ref name="SWRR" />

==Appearances==
